acquisition method: we chose targeted LC–MS/MS (as described for phosphopeptides previously)
cleavage agent: Upon digestion with trypsin or other common enzymes
fragmentation method: For detection and analysis of phosphopeptides, multistage activation was used
instrument: analyzed by LC–MS/MS on an LTQ-ORBITRAP mass spectrometer
labeling: the unphosphorylated versions of phospho-Peptides 1 to 3 have also been detected
